let Edge p q := ∃ x : ℕ, 0 < x ∧ p * q = x^2 + x + k
  let G := {e : Finset ↥S | ∃ p q, e = {p, q} ∧ Edge p q}
  have h_unique_neighbors : ∀ p : S, (G.filter (p ∈ ·)).card ≤ 2 := by
    intro p
    let y (q : S) : ℕ := (Nat.sqrt (4 * p * q - 4 * k + 1))
    have h_y (q : S) (hq : Edge p q) : (y q)^2 = 4 * p * q - 4 * k + 1 ∧ y q % 2 = 1 := by
      rcases hq with ⟨x, hx, hpx⟩
      have : 4 * (p * q) = 4 * (x^2 + x + k) := by rw [hpx]
      have : 4 * p * q = (2 * x + 1)^2 + 4 * k - 1 := by nlinarith
      have : 4 * p * q - 4 * k + 1 = (2 * x + 1)^2 := by rw [this]; omega
      have hy : y q = 2 * x + 1 := by rw [y, this, Nat.sqrt_set_is_square]; exact ⟨2*x+1, rfl⟩
      rw [hy]; exact ⟨by rw [← hy, this], by omega⟩
    have h_mod (q₁ q₂ : S) (hq₁ : Edge p q₁) (hq₂ : Edge p q₂) : y q₁ ≡ y q₂ [MOD p] ∨ y q₁ ≡ -y q₂ [MOD p] := by
      have : (y q₁)^2 ≡ 1 - 4 * k [MOD p] := by rw [(h_y q₁ hq₁).1]; exact Nat.modeq_zero_iff_dvd.mpr (by omega)
      have : (y q₂)^2 ≡ 1 - 4 * k [MOD p] := by rw [(h_y q₂ hq₂).1]; exact Nat.modeq_zero_iff_dvd.mpr (by omega)
      have : (y q₁)^2 ≡ (y q₂)^2 [MOD p] := this.symm.trans ‹_›
      exact Nat.Prime.modeq_sq_iff (hS p p.2).2 this
    set S_p := {q : S | Edge p q}
    have : S_p.card ≤ 2 := sorry
    sorry
  sorry

have h_unique_neighbors : ∀ p ∈ S, {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, (p : ℕ) * q = x^2 + x + k ∧ q < p}.card ≤ 2 := by

        refine Nat.mul_self_lt_mul_self_iff.1 (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_add_right (x^2) (x+k)) ?_)

    simp [f] at heq; apply Subtype.ext; apply Subtype.ext
    let x := (f ⟨q1, hq1⟩).1.1
    have h1 := (Finset.mem_filter.1 hq1).2.choose_spec.2
    have h2 := (Finset.mem_filter.1 hq2).2.choose_spec.2
    exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left hp_prime.pos (h1.trans h2.symm)

let E : S → S → Prop := λ a b => ∃ x : ℕ, 0 < x ∧ (a : ℕ) * b = x ^ 2 + x + k
  have h_symm : ∀ {a b}, E a b ↔ E b a := by
    intro a b; constructor <;> rintro ⟨x, hx, h⟩ <;> refine ⟨x, hx, ?_⟩ <;> rwa [mul_comm] at h
  have h_p1 : ∀ i, E (p₁ i) (p₁ (i + 1)) := hp₁
  have h_p2 : ∀ i, E (p₂ i) (p₂ (i + 1)) := hp₂

    intro i
    refine ⟨Finset.card_doubleton (p₁.injective.ne (Fin.ne_of_vne (by simp))), p₁ i, by simp, p₁ (i + 1), by simp, ?_⟩
    exact ⟨p₁.injective.ne (Fin.ne_of_vne (by simp)), h_p1 i⟩
  have h_edges2 : ∀ i, {p₂ i, p₂ (i + 1)} ∈ G := by
    intro i

    exact ⟨p₂.injective.ne (Fin.ne_of_vne (by simp)), h_p2 i⟩

    refine Finset.ext_iff.mpr (λ e => ?_)
    suffices e ∈ p1_edges ↔ e ∈ G by
      rw [this]; symmetry
      suffices e ∈ p2_edges ↔ e ∈ G by exact this
      constructor; intro h; rcases Finset.mem_map.1 h with ⟨i, _, rfl⟩; exact h_edges2 i
      intro hG; rcases hG with ⟨hcard, a, ha, b, hb, hab, hE⟩

    constructor; intro h; rcases Finset.mem_map.1 h with ⟨i, _, rfl⟩; exact h_edges1 i
    intro hG; rcases hG with ⟨hcard, a, ha, b, hb, hab, hE⟩
    sorry -- Core IMO 2022 P3 number theory: any Hamiltonian cycle in G is unique

    have : y^2 ≡ -m [MOD 4 * a] := by rw [← hy2]; ring_nf; use c; ring

have h_smaller : ∀ a ∈ S, {b ∈ S | b < a ∧ ∃ x > 0, a * b = x^2 + x + k}.card ≤ 2 := by
    intro a ha

        rw [hxb]; ring

        use (y - 1) / 2
        have hy_sq : y^2 = 4*a*b - D := hy

        constructor; · omega
        rw [Nat.div_pow_of_dvd (by omega : 2 ∣ y - 1), ← Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_left (by omega : 0 < 4)]

        omega

      intro b1 b2 _ _ _ _ h; simpa using h
    exact Nat.le_trans (Finset.card_le_card_of_inj_on (λ b => (hf b).mp ‹_›).choose (by sorry) (by sorry)) h_sol_card

have n_pos : 0 < #S := by

    constructor <;> rintro ⟨x, hx, h⟩ <;> exact ⟨x, hx, by rw [mul_comm, h]⟩
  have hp₁_edges : ∀ i : Fin #S, R (p₁ i) (p₁ (i + 1)) := fun i ↦ hp₁ i

      rw [Finset.card_congr (fun s _ ↦ (s.erase a).min'.get (by
        have : s.card = 2 := (by
          rcases (Finset.mem_filter.1 (by assumption)).2.1 with h_card
          exact h_card)
        rw [←Finset.card_erase_add_one (by rcases (Finset.mem_filter.1 (by assumption)).1 with h_in; exact h_in), h_card]
        decide))]

        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hs
        rcases hs.2.2 with ⟨x, hxa, y, hyb, hxy, hRxy⟩
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, ha, true_and]
        have hsa : a ∈ s := hs.1
        have h_other : (s.erase a).card = 1 := by rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hsa, hs.2.1]; rfl
        obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := Finset.card_eq_one.1 h_other
        have hba : b ≠ a := by
          intro h; rw [h] at hb
          have : a ∉ s.erase a := Finset.not_mem_erase a s
          rw [hb] at this; exact this (Finset.mem_singleton_self a)
        have hbS : b ∈ S := by
          have : s ⊆ S := hs.2.1 ▸ hs.1
          rw [←Finset.insert_erase hsa, hb] at hs
          exact hs.2.1 (Finset.mem_insert_of_mem (Finset.mem_singleton_self b))
        refine ⟨hbS, hba, ?_⟩
        rw [←Finset.insert_erase hsa, hb] at hs
        rcases hs.2.2 with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, huv, hRuv⟩
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hu hv
        cases hu <;> cases hv <;> try contradiction
        · rwa [mul_comm] at hRuv
        · assumption
      · rcases (Finset.mem_filter.1 (by assumption)).2.1 with h_card
        exact h_card
      · exact sorry
      · exact sorry
    exact sorry
  exact sorry

have h_unique_edges : ∀ (p : Fin #S ≃ S), Condition k S p →
    ∀ i, { (p i : ℕ), (p (i + 1) : ℕ) } ∈ (Finset.univ.image (fun i => {(p i : ℕ), (p (i + 1) : ℕ)})) := fun p _ i => Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ _)

    apply Finset.ext; intro e; constructor <;> intro he

      obtain ⟨x, y, hxy, heq⟩ := by

      use 2 * x + 1; refine ⟨by omega, by omega, ?_⟩
      rw [hx_eq]; ring

      have hyv_lt : yv < 2 * p := by

  else
    have : NeZero n := ⟨by linarith⟩
    have h_edges : ∀ i, {p₁ i, p₁ (i + 1)} ∈ Finset.univ.image (λ i : Fin n => {(p₂ i : ℕ), (p₂ (i + 1) : ℕ)}) := sorry
    sorry

have h_unique : ∀ p ∈ S, {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x ^ 2 + x + k}.card ≤ 2 := by
    intro p hp
    let f (q : ℕ) : ℕ := if h : ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k then 2 * h.choose + 1 else 0
    have hf : ∀ q ∈ {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k}, f q > 0 ∧ (f q) ^ 2 = 4 * p * q - (4 * k - 1) := by
      intro q hq; simp [f] at hq ⊢; obtain ⟨x, hx1, hx2⟩ := hq.2
      have hx : (Exists.choose (⟨x, hx1, hx2⟩ : ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k)) = x := by
        have : ∃! x, x > 0 ∧ p * q = x^2 + x + k := by
          refine ⟨x, ⟨hx1, hx2⟩, fun x' hx' => ?_⟩
          have : x^2 + x = x'^2 + x' := by rw [← hx2, ← hx'.2]
          exact Nat.pow_two_add_n_inj hx'.1 hx1 this
        exact this.unique ⟨hx1, hx2⟩ (Exists.choose_spec _)
      rw [hx]; refine ⟨Nat.succ_pos _, ?_⟩; linear_combination 4 * hx2
    have h_lt : ∀ q ∈ {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k}, q < p → f q < 2 * p := by
      intro q hq hqp; have := (hf q hq).2; rw [this]
      apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_left (n := 2); rw [Nat.mul_pow]; nlinarith
    have h_mod : ∀ q ∈ {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k}, (f q) ^ 2 ≡ 1 - 4 * k [MOD p] := by
      intro q hq; have := (hf q hq).2; rw [this]; simp [Nat.modeq_iff_dvd]; ring_nf; apply dvd_mul_right
    let f_val (q : ↥{q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k}) : Fin (2 * p) := ⟨f q % (2 * p), Nat.mod_lt _ (by obtain ⟨_, hp'⟩ := hS p hp; exact Nat.Prime.pos (Nat.mul_pos (by omega) hp'))⟩
    have f_inj : {q ∈ S | ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k} ∩ {q | q < p} ⊆ {q | ∃ y, f q = y} := by simp
    let p_max := S.max' (by by_contra h; simp [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h; rw [h] at hp₁; exact (hp₁ 0).choose_spec.1.ne' rfl)
    let s_edge (p q : ℕ) := ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k
    have h_deg : ∀ p ∈ S, {q ∈ S | s_edge p q}.card ≤ 2 := by
      let G : SimpleGraph S := { Adj := fun a b => s_edge a b }
      intro p hp; set T := {q ∈ S | s_edge p q}
      have : ∀ q ∈ T, q < p ∨ q > p := by intro q hq; simp at hq; obtain ⟨x, hx, hxpq⟩ := hq.2;
        by_contra! h; obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h; rw [h1] at hxpq; have : p^2 - (x^2 + x + k) = 0 := by rw [hxpq]; omega
        have h_prime : Nat.Prime p := (hS p hp).2; have h_odd : Odd p := (hS p hp).1
        have : 4 * p^2 - (2*x+1)^2 = 4*k-1 := by linear_combination 4 * hxpq
        have : (2*p - (2*x+1)) * (2*p + (2*x+1)) = 4*k-1 := by linear_combination this
        nlinarith
      have : ∀ q1 q2, q1 ∈ T → q2 ∈ T → q1 < p → q2 < p → q1 = q2 := by
        intro q1 q2 hq1 hq2 hq1p hq2p
        have hf1 := hf q1 hq1; have hf2 := hf q2 hq2
        have hmod1 := h_mod q1 hq1; have hmod2 := h_mod q2 hq2
        have hlt1 := h_lt q1 hq1 hq1p; have hlt2 := h_lt q2 hq2 hq2p
        have h_sq : f q1 ^ 2 ≡ f q2 ^ 2 [MOD p] := by rw [hmod1, hmod2]
        have h_odd1 : Odd (f q1) := by obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := (hf q1 hq1); use x
        have h_odd2 : Odd (f q2) := by obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := (hf q2 hq2); use x
        have : f q1 ≡ f q2 [MOD p] ∨ f q1 ≡ p - f q2 [MOD p] := by
          rw [Nat.modeq_iff_dvd] at h_sq; rw [← Nat.sq_sub_sq] at h_sq
          have h_prime := (hS p hp).2; rw [Nat.Prime.dvd_mul h_prime] at h_sq
          cases h_sq with | ih => left; rwa [Nat.modeq_iff_dvd] | ih => right; rw [Nat.modeq_iff_dvd]
          rw [Nat.modeq_iff_dvd] at h_sq; obtain ⟨x1, hx1, _⟩ := hq1.2; obtain ⟨x2, hx2, _⟩ := hq2.2
          rw [hf1.2, hf2.2] at h_sq; sorry
        sorry
      sorry
    sorry
  sorry
sorry

have h_unique_neighbors : ∀ p ∈ S, ∀ q ∈ S, (∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k) →
      (q : ℤ) ≡ (Nat.sqrt (4 * p * q - 4 * k + 1) - 1) / 2 [ZMOD p] := sorry
  have h_degenerate : ∀ p ∈ S, {q ∈ S | q < p ∧ ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k}.card ≤ 2 := by
    intro p hp
    let roots := {x ∈ Finset.range p | (x^2 + x + k) % p = 0}
    have h_roots : roots.card ≤ 2 := Nat.card_roots_quadratic_mod_prime (hS p hp).2 (by
      intro h; exact (hS p hp).1.ne_two (Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_two (hS p hp).2 (h ▸ dvd_zero 2)))
    apply (Finset.card_le_card (show {q ∈ S | q < p ∧ ∃ x > 0, p * q = x^2 + x + k} ⊆
      roots.image (fun x => (x^2 + x + k) / p)).trans (Finset.card_image_le.trans h_roots))
    intro q hq
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_image, mem_range] at hq ⊢
    rcases hq with ⟨hqS, hqp, x, hx, h_eq⟩
    let x₀ := x % p
    have hx₀ : x₀ < p := Nat.mod_lt _ (hS p hp).2.pos
    use x₀, ⟨hx₀, by rw [←Nat.mod_add_div x p, h_eq] at h_eq; simpa [x₀, Nat.add_sq] using (dvd_zero p).mpr (by rw [←h_eq]; exact dvd_zero p)⟩
    rw [←h_eq]
    have hx_lt_p : x < p := by
      apply Nat.mul_self_lt_mul_self_iff.mp
      calc x * x < x * x + x + k := by omega
           _ = p * q := h_eq
           _ < p * p := Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hqp (hS p hp).2.pos
    rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hx_lt_p]
  sorry

let E : S → S → Prop := λ a b ↦ ∃ x : ℕ, 0 < x ∧ (a : ℕ) * b = x^2 + x + k
  have hE : ∀ a b, E a b ↔ E b a := by
    intro a b; constructor <;> intro h <;> obtain ⟨x, hx, hx2⟩ := h <;> use x, hx <;>
    rw [← hx2, mul_comm]
  let G : SimpleGraph S := SimpleGraph.fromRel E
  have hG : ∀ {a b}, G.Adj a b ↔ E a b := by
    intro a b; constructor <;> intro h
    · exact h.1
    · exact ⟨h, (λ hab ↦ by
        obtain ⟨x, hx, hx2⟩ := h
        have : (a : ℕ) * a = x^2 + x + k := by rw [hab] at hx2; exact hx2
        have hodd : Odd (a : ℕ) := (hS a a.2).1
        have : Odd (x^2 + x + k) := by rw [← this]; exact hodd.mul hodd
        have hx2x : Even (x^2 + x) := by rw [pow_two, ← Nat.mul_succ]; exact Nat.even_mul_self_pred (x + 1)
        have : Odd k := Nat.even_add_one.mp (by
          have : Odd (x^2 + x + k) := ⟨(x^2 + x + k) / 2, rfl⟩
          sorry)
        sorry)⟩
  sorry
